encounters.trigger: destroying the drone unlocks the security gate to the server room
overloading the server terminal triggers the lockdown alarm
deactivating the sentinel drops the bridge to the boss arena

boss.name: Security Mainframe AI
boss.victory_condition: successfully upload the virus while the boss is stunned

level.objective: infiltrate the megacorp data center and extract the classified project files
level.reward: access to the company offshore banking server

level.setting: A crumbling, rain-slicked mega-city district controlled by corrupt conglomerates.

encounters.hazard: Falling debris from unstable holographic billboards.
encounters.trigger: Triggering the silent alarm forces the sector lockdown to initiate.

encounters.hazard: Superheated steam pipes venting at random intervals.
encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone triggers the secondary ventilation purge, opening the path to the server room.

encounters.hazard: Electric floor grids that cycle every three seconds.

pickup.name: Neural Bypass Chip
pickup.effect: Allows interaction with the boss's internal firewall.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the android unlocks the restricted elevator leading to the CEO penthouse.

boss.name: Cyber-Tyrant Arasaka
boss.victory_condition: Disable the firewall and land a final strike before the building self-destructs.

level.objective: Assassinate the CEO and wipe the city's debt database.
level.reward: The liberation of the lower-city districts and a legendary stealth augmentation.

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone reveals a decrypted data packet directing you to the mainframe entrance.
Deactivating the Sentinel unlocks the path to the Core Terminal.

pickup.name: Master Override Key
pickup.effect: Exposes the Core AI's cooling system.

encounters.trigger: The Cyborg collapses, dropping the master override key needed to engage the Central AI.

boss.name: Central AI Prime
boss.victory_condition: Use the override key to lower heat shields then strike the cooling core.

level.objective: Infiltrate the Neural Core and purge the sentient virus.

level.setting: A rain-slicked, dystopian megacity controlled by a malfunctioning AI.

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone triggers a system override that unlocks the access port to the server room.
Defeating the guard causes his neural link to map the path to the main processor core.

pickup.name: Feedback Loop Module
pickup.effect: Allows the player to parry boss energy attacks.

encounters.trigger: The sentinel's shutdown sequence initiates the lift to the CEO's observation deck.

boss.name: Aion the Corrupt
boss.victory_condition: Reflect the boss's ultimate time-shattering blast back at him using the module.

level.objective: Infiltrate the mega-corporation and stabilize the timeline.
level.reward: The Chronos Key: grants ability to pause time for 5 seconds.

level.setting: a decaying metropolis known as Sector 7

encounters.trigger: stepping on a leaking data-conduit
downloading corrupted log files
interacting with the central reactor terminal

boss.name: The Architect
boss.victory_condition: short-circuit the boss core using the neural link

level.objective: infiltrate the megacorp vault and retrieve the source code
level.reward: infinite supply of chemical reagents and corporate clearance

level.setting: A rain-slicked, abandoned metropolis where humanity has long been replaced by failing machinery.

encounters.hazard: Exposed high-voltage wires on the floor.

pickup.name: EMP Pulse Module
pickup.effect: Disables advanced targeting systems for 10 seconds.

encounters.trigger: Opening the main terminal initiates an overload, drawing the stalker out.

encounters.hazard: Toxic gas venting from overhead pipes.
encounters.trigger: Destroying the server rack causes a security lockdown, triggering the Sentinel.

encounters.hazard: Floor tiles that retract to reveal a bottomless abyss.

pickup.name: Access Override Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the inner chamber gate leading to the CEO Office.

encounters.trigger: Entering the vault pressure plate triggers the enforcer's stealth protocol.

boss.name: The Chrome Titan
boss.victory_condition: Insert the key into the Titan's spinal port to trigger a system shutdown.

level.objective: Infiltrate the mega-corp tower and extract the encrypted data core.
level.reward: The encrypted data core containing evidence to bring down the city-state's governing board.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the drone releases a static charge that unlocks the data gate.

pickup.name: Frequency Tuner
pickup.effect: Allows player to resonate with heavy metallic shields.

encounters.trigger: Shattering the bot reveals a frequency key for the main spire.

pickup.name: Master Override Chip
pickup.effect: Used to disable the final boss's primary defense.

encounters.trigger: Purifying the sprite drops a Master Override Chip.

boss.name: The Glitch-Witch of Silicon Valley
boss.victory_condition: Use the chip to force a factory reset on her mainframe.

level.objective: Restore the city's whimsical energy flow.
level.reward: The ability to summon glitter-infused lightning bolts.

level.setting: A tranquil, rain-slicked cyberpunk metropolis at night where the neon lights mirror the calm stars above.

pickup.name: Conductive Silicon Shard
pickup.effect: Allows the user to manipulate electrical currents.

encounters.trigger: Approaching the holographic flowerbed triggers the drone activation.

pickup.name: Gravity Anchor
pickup.effect: Increases rock density and tectonic weight.

encounters.trigger: Stepping onto the central platform causes the guard to materialize from the static.
Accessing the main terminal initiates the defense protocol.

boss.name: Zenith AI Architect
boss.victory_condition: Insert the key to freeze the AI and force a peaceful system reboot.

level.objective: Deactivate the sentient city core without disturbing the peaceful neon ambiance.
level.reward: The city's infinite archives and control over the district's environmental climate.
